@startuml
actor User
participant LoginInterface
participant AuthService
participant UserDatabase

User -> LoginInterface : enterCredentials()
LoginInterface -> AuthService : forwardCredentials()
AuthService -> UserDatabase : loadUserRecord()
UserDatabase --> AuthService : userRecord
AuthService --> LoginInterface : accessToken
LoginInterface --> User : notifySuccess()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant Interface
  participant AuthService
  participant UserDB
  User->>Interface: enterCredentials()
  Interface->>AuthService: forwardCredentials()
  AuthService->>UserDB: loadUserRecord()
  UserDB-->>AuthService: userRecord
  AuthService-->>Interface: verifyPasswordHash()

sequenceDiagram(name = "UserLoginProcess") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "LoginInterface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "AuthService")
    val userDatabase = lifeline(name = "UserDatabase")
    
    message(from = user, to = loginInterface, label = "enterCredentials()")

}

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant WebShop
participant SearchService
participant ProductCatalog

Buyer -> WebShop : enterSearchTerm()
WebShop -> SearchService : search(term)
SearchService -> ProductCatalog : findProducts(term)
ProductCatalog --> SearchService : productList
SearchService --> WebShop : productList

WebShop -> ProductCatalog : loadImages(productList)
ProductCatalog --> WebShop : images

WebShop --> Buyer : displayResultsPage()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Buyer
  participant Shop
  participant SearchService
  participant ProductCatalog
  Buyer->>Shop: enterSearchTerm()
  Shop->>SearchService: searchProducts()
  SearchService->>ProductCatalog: findMatchingProducts()
  ProductCatalog-->>SearchService: resultsList
  SearchService-->>Shop: resultsList
  alt resultsFound
    Shop->>ProductCatalog: loadProductImages()
    ProductCatalog-->>Shop: productImages
  end
  Shop-->>Buyer: displayResultsPage()

@startuml
actor Customer
participant Shop
participant CheckoutService
participant PaymentGateway
participant Database

Customer -> Shop : initiateCheckout()
Shop -> CheckoutService : startCheckout()
CheckoutService -> PaymentGateway : verifyPaymentDetails()
PaymentGateway --> CheckoutService : verificationResult

alt Payment details valid
    CheckoutService -> Database : saveOrder()
    Database --> CheckoutService : orderSaved
    CheckoutService -> PaymentGateway : processPayment()
    PaymentGateway --> CheckoutService : paymentProcessed
    CheckoutService --> Shop : checkoutSuccess
else Payment details invalid
    CheckoutService --> Shop : checkoutError
end

Shop --> Customer : displayResult
@enduml

sequenceDiagram(name = "SearchProcess") {
    val buyer = lifeline(name = "Buyer") { isActor = true }
    val shop = lifeline(name = "WebShop")
    val searchService = lifeline(name = "SearchService")
    val productCatalog = lifeline(name = "ProductCatalog")
    
    message(from = buyer, to = shop, label = "enterSearchTerm()")
    message(from = shop, to = searchService, label = "searchProducts()")
    message(from = searchService, to = productCatalog, label = "findProducts()")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = searchService, label = "productList")
    reply(from = searchService, to = shop, label = "resultsList")
    message(from = shop, to = productCatalog, label = "loadProductImages()")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = shop, label = "images")
    reply(from = shop, to = buyer, label = "displayResultsPage()")
}

sequenceDiagram(name = "CheckoutProcess") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val shop = lifeline(name = "Shop")
    val checkoutService = lifeline(name = "CheckoutService")
    val paymentGateway = lifeline(name = "PaymentGateway")
    val database = lifeline(name = "Database")

    message(from = customer, to = shop, label = "initiateCheckout()")
    message(from = shop, to = checkoutService, label = "startCheckout()")
    message(from = checkoutService, to = paymentGateway, label = "verifyPaymentDetails()")
    reply(from = paymentGateway, to = checkoutService, label = "verificationResult")

    message(from = checkoutService, to = database, label = "saveOrder()")
    reply(from = database, to = checkoutService, label = "orderSaved")

    message(from = checkoutService, to = paymentGateway, label = "processPayment()")
    reply(from = paymentGateway, to = checkoutService, label = "paymentProcessed")

    reply(from = checkoutService, to = shop, label = "checkoutResult")
    reply(from = shop, to = customer, label = "displayResult()")
}

sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant Shop
  participant CheckoutService
  participant PaymentGateway
  participant Database

  Customer->>Shop: initiateCheckout()
  Shop->>CheckoutService: startCheckout()
  CheckoutService->>PaymentGateway: verifyPaymentDetails()
  alt Payment details valid
    PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: verificationSuccess
    CheckoutService->>Database: saveOrder()
    Database-->>CheckoutService: orderSaved
    CheckoutService->>PaymentGateway: processPayment()
    PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: paymentProcessed
    CheckoutService-->>Shop: checkoutSuccess
  else Payment details invalid
    PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: verificationFailed
    CheckoutService-->>Shop: checkoutError
  end
  Shop-->>Customer: displayResult

@startuml
actor Client
participant APIGateway
participant RateLimiter
participant BackendService

Client -> APIGateway : requestData()
APIGateway -> RateLimiter : checkQuota()
RateLimiter --> APIGateway : quotaAvailable
alt Quota Available
    APIGateway -> BackendService : forwardRequest()
    BackendService --> APIGateway : data
    APIGateway --> Client : data
else Quota Exhausted
    APIGateway --> Client : rejectTooManyRequests()
    loop Retry up to 3 times
        Client -> Client : waitBackoffPeriod()
        Client -> APIGateway : requestData()
        APIGateway -> RateLimiter : checkQuota()
        RateLimiter --> APIGateway : quotaAvailable
        alt Quota Available
            APIGateway -> BackendService : forwardRequest()
            BackendService --> APIGateway : data
            APIGateway --> Client : data
            break
        else Quota Exhausted
            APIGateway --> Client : rejectTooManyRequests()
        end
    end
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Client
  participant APIGateway
  participant RateLimiter
  participant BackendService
  Client->>APIGateway: requestData()
  APIGateway->>RateLimiter: checkQuota()
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaAvailable
  APIGateway->>BackendService: forwardRequest()
  BackendService-->>APIGateway: data
  APIGateway-->>Client: data
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaExceeded
  APIGateway-->>Client: rejectRequest()
  Client->>Client: waitBackoff()
  Client->>APIGateway: requestData()
  APIGateway->>RateLimiter: checkQuota()
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaAvailable
  APIGateway->>BackendService: forwardRequest()
  BackendService-->>APIGateway: data
  APIGateway-->>Client: data
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaExceeded
  APIGateway-->>Client: rejectRequest()
  Client->>Client: waitBackoff()
  Client->>APIGateway: requestData()
  APIGateway->>RateLimiter: checkQuota()
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaAvailable
  APIGateway->>BackendService: forwardRequest()
  BackendService-->>APIGateway: data
  APIGateway-->>Client: data
  RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: quotaExceeded
  APIGateway-->>Client: rejectRequest()

sequenceDiagram(name = "ClientRequestFlow") {
    val client = lifeline(name = "Client") { isActor = true }
    val apiGateway = lifeline(name = "APIGateway")
    val rateLimiter = lifeline(name = "RateLimiter")
    val backendService = lifeline(name = "BackendService")

    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "requestData()")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "checkQuota()")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "quotaAvailable()")

alt cache miss
    APIGateway -> AuthService : verifyToken(JWT)
    AuthService --> APIGateway : verificationResult
    APIGateway -> TokenCache : storeVerificationResult(JWT, verificationResult)
end

alt token valid
    APIGateway -> OrderService : forwardRequest()
    OrderService --> APIGateway : orderList
    APIGateway --> Client : orderList
else token invalid
    APIGateway --> Client : accessDenied
end

  alt cacheResult is empty
    APIGateway->>AuthService: verifyToken(JWT)
    AuthService-->>APIGateway: verificationResult
    APIGateway->>TokenCache: storeResult(JWT, verificationResult)
  end
  alt token is valid

    OrderService-->>APIGateway: orderList

@startuml
actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant SagaOrchestrator
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService
participant EventLog

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
OrderService -> SagaOrchestrator : instantiateOrchestrator()
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : writeStep("Order received")
SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems()
WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsAvailable()

alt itemsAvailable
    SagaOrchestrator -> PaymentService : executePayment()
    PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentSuccess()

    alt paymentSuccess
        SagaOrchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment()
        ShipmentService --> SagaOrchestrator : shipmentCommissioned()
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : writeStep("Order completed")
    else paymentFailed
        SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation()
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : writeStep("Payment failed, reservation cancelled")
    end
else itemsNotAvailable
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : writeStep("Items not available, transaction aborted")
end

SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : tearDownOrchestrator()
OrderService -> Customer : informOrderStatus()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram(name = "OrderProcess") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val orderService = lifeline(name = "OrderService")
    val orchestrator = lifeline(name = "SagaOrchestrator")
    val warehouseService = lifeline(name = "WarehouseService")
    val paymentService = lifeline(name = "PaymentService")
    val shipmentService = lifeline(name = "ShipmentService")
    val eventLog = lifeline(name = "EventLog")

    message(from = customer, to = orderService, label = "placeOrder()")
    message(from = orderService, to = orchestrator, label = "instantiateOrchestrator()")
    message(from = orchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logTransactionStart()")
    message(from = orchestrator, to = warehouseService, label = "reserveItems()")
    reply(from = warehouseService, to = orchestrator, label = "reservationStatus")
    message(from = orchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logReservationStatus()")

    message(from = orchestrator, to = paymentService, label = "executePayment()")
    reply(from = paymentService, to = orchestrator, label = "paymentStatus")
    message(from = orchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logPaymentStatus()")

    message(from = orchestrator, to = shipmentService, label = "commissionShipment()")
    reply(from = shipmentService, to = orchestrator, label = "shipmentStatus")
    message(from = orchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logShipmentStatus()")

    message(from = orchestrator, to = warehouseService, label = "cancelReservation()")

    message(from = orchestrator, to = orderService, label = "tearDownOrchestrator()")
    message(from = orderService, to = customer, label = "informOrderStatus()")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant ClientApp
participant Browser
participant AuthServer
participant SessionStore
participant AuditLog
participant ResourceServer

User -> ClientApp : initiateLogin()
ClientApp -> Browser : redirectToAuthServer()
Browser -> AuthServer : requestLoginForm()
AuthServer -> SessionStore : createSession()
SessionStore --> AuthServer : sessionCreated
AuthServer --> Browser : deliverLoginForm()
Browser -> User : displayLoginForm()
User -> Browser : enterCredentials()
Browser -> AuthServer : submitCredentials()
AuthServer -> SessionStore : verifySession()
SessionStore --> AuthServer : sessionVerified

alt credentialsCorrect
    AuthServer -> ClientApp : issueAuthCode()
    ClientApp -> AuthServer : exchangeAuthCodeForToken()
    AuthServer -> AuditLog : logTokenIssuance()
    AuthServer --> ClientApp : accessToken
    AuditLog --> AuthServer : logRecorded

    alt scopeIncludesProfile
        ClientApp -> ResourceServer : requestUserData()
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verifyToken()
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : tokenVerified
        ResourceServer --> ClientApp : userData
    end
else credentialsIncorrect
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discardSession()
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : sessionDiscarded
    AuthServer --> Browser : errorMessage()
    Browser -> User : displayErrorMessage()
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant ClientApp
  participant Browser
  participant AuthServer
  participant SessionStore
  participant AuditLog
  participant ResourceServer

  User->>ClientApp: initiateLogin()
  ClientApp->>Browser: redirectToAuthServer()
  Browser->>AuthServer: requestLogin()
  AuthServer->>SessionStore: createSession()
  SessionStore-->>AuthServer: sessionCreated()
  AuthServer-->>Browser: deliverLoginForm()
  User->>Browser: enterCredentials()
  Browser->>AuthServer: submitCredentials()
  alt credentialsValid
    AuthServer->>ClientApp: issueAuthCode()
    ClientApp->>AuthServer: exchangeAuthCodeForToken()
    AuthServer-->>ClientApp: accessToken
    AuthServer->>AuditLog: logTokenIssuance()
    alt scopeIncludesProfile
      ClientApp->>ResourceServer: requestUserData()
      ResourceServer->>AuthServer: verifyToken()
      AuthServer-->>ResourceServer: tokenVerified()
      ResourceServer-->>ClientApp: userData
    end
  else credentialsInvalid
    AuthServer->>SessionStore: discardSession()
    SessionStore-->>AuthServer: sessionDiscarded()
    AuthServer-->>Browser: errorMessage()
  end

sequenceDiagram(name = "LoginProcess") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val clientApp = lifeline(name = "ClientApp")
    val browser = lifeline(name = "Browser")
    val authServer = lifeline(name = "AuthServer")
    val sessionStore = lifeline(name = "SessionStore")
    val auditLog = lifeline(name = "AuditLog")
    val resourceServer = lifeline(name = "ResourceServer")

    message(from = user, to = clientApp, label = "initiateLogin()")
    message(from = clientApp, to = browser, label = "redirectToAuthServer()")
    message(from = browser, to = authServer, label = "requestLogin()")

    reply(from = sessionStore, to = authServer, label = "sessionCreated")
    message(from = authServer, to = browser, label = "deliverLoginForm()")
    message(from = user, to = browser, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = browser, to = authServer, label = "submitCredentials()")
    message(from = authServer, to = sessionStore, label = "verifyCredentials()")
    reply(from = sessionStore, to = authServer, label = "credentialsVerified")
    message(from = authServer, to = clientApp, label = "issueAuthCode()")
    message(from = clientApp, to = authServer, label = "exchangeAuthCodeForToken()")
    message(from = authServer, to = auditLog, label = "noteTokenIssuance()")
    reply(from = auditLog, to = authServer, label = "noted")
    reply(from = authServer, to = clientApp, label = "accessTokenIssued")
    message(from = clientApp, to = resourceServer, label = "requestUserData()")
    message(from = resourceServer, to = authServer, label = "reVerifyToken()")
    reply(from = authServer, to = resourceServer, label = "tokenVerified")
    message(from = resourceServer, to = clientApp, label = "deliverUserData()")
    message(from = authServer, to = sessionStore, label = "discardSession()")
    message(from = authServer, to = browser, label = "showErrorMessage()")
}

@startuml
actor Driver
participant Camera
participant Radar
participant FusionUnit
participant EmergencyBrakingAssistant
participant ControlUnit
participant DiagnosticLog

Camera -> FusionUnit : deliverMeasurementData()
Radar -> FusionUnit : deliverMeasurementData()
FusionUnit -> EmergencyBrakingAssistant : reportCollisionRisk(timeToCollision)

alt timeToCollision < criticalThreshold
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> Driver : warnAcoustically()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : initiateBrakingManeuver()
    loop until vehicle is stationary
        EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : adjustBrakePressure()
    end
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : recordEvent()
else
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> Driver : showDistanceWarning()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : logObservedRisk()
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Camera
  actor Radar
  participant FusionUnit
  participant EmergencyBrakingAssistant
  participant ControlUnit
  participant DiagnosticLog

  Camera->>FusionUnit: deliverMeasurementData()
  Radar->>FusionUnit: deliverMeasurementData()
  FusionUnit->>EmergencyBrakingAssistant: reportCollisionRisk(timeToCollision)
  alt timeToCollision < criticalThreshold
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>Driver: warnAcoustically()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>ControlUnit: initiateAutonomousBraking()
    loop until vehicle is stationary
      EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>ControlUnit: adjustBrakePressure()
    end
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>DiagnosticLog: recordEvent()
  else timeToCollision >= criticalThreshold
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>Driver: showDistanceWarning()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>DiagnosticLog: logObservedRisk()
  end

    val emergencyBrakingAssistant = lifeline(name = "EmergencyBrakingAssistant")
    val driver = lifeline(name = "Driver") { isActor = true }
    val controlUnit = lifeline(name = "ControlUnit")
    val diagnosticLog = lifeline(name = "DiagnosticLog")

    message(from = cameraSensor, to = fusionUnit, label = "deliverMeasurementData()")
    message(from = radarSensor, to = fusionUnit, label = "deliverMeasurementData()")
    message(from = fusionUnit, to = emergencyBrakingAssistant, label = "reportCollisionRisk()")
    reply(from = emergencyBrakingAssistant, to = fusionUnit, label = "timeToCollision")

    message(from = emergencyBrakingAssistant, to = driver, label = "warnDriverAcoustically()")
    message(from = emergencyBrakingAssistant, to = controlUnit, label = "initiateAutonomousBraking()")
    message(from = emergencyBrakingAssistant, to = controlUnit, label = "adjustBrakePressure()")

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "BicycleSystem") {
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "RearWheel")
    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "FrontWheel")
    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "SteeringAssembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "BrakingSystem")
    val bicycleSystem = partDef(name = "BicycleSystem") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steeringAssembly", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }
    bdd(name = "BicycleSystem BDD") {
        include(bicycleSystem)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
        include(brakingSystem)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "RobotArmModel") {
    val base = partDef(name = "Base")
    val endEffector = partDef(name = "EndEffector")
    val joint = partDef(name = "Joint")
    val revoluteJoint = partDef(name = "RevoluteJoint")
    val prismaticJoint = partDef(name = "PrismaticJoint")
    
    generalization(specific = revoluteJoint, general = joint)
    generalization(specific = prismaticJoint, general = joint)
    
    val robotArm = partDef(name = "RobotArm") {
        part(name = "base", typeId = base.id)
        part(name = "endEffector", typeId = endEffector.id)
        part(name = "joint", typeId = joint.id, multiplicity = "1..6")
    }
    
    bdd(name = "RobotArmModel BDD") {
        include(base)
        include(endEffector)
        include(joint)
        include(revoluteJoint)
        include(prismaticJoint)
        include(robotArm)
    }
}

finalCode:
import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR_ECU_Model") {
    val communicationController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller", isAbstract = true)
    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val ethernetController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module", isAbstract = true)
    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val canStack = partDef(name = "CAN Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val ethernetStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val systemServices = partDef(name = "System Services", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    
    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flashMemory = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")
    val vfb = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")
    
    val hardwareLayer = partDef(name = "Hardware Layer") {
        part(name = "cpuCore", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flashMemory", typeId = flashMemory.id)
        part(name = "canController", typeId = canController.id)
        part(name = "linController", typeId = linController.id)
        part(name = "ethernetController", typeId = ethernetController.id)
    }
    
    val bswLayer = partDef(name = "AUTOSAR BSW Layer") {
        part(name = "mcal", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "canStack", typeId = canStack.id)
        part(name = "ethernetStack", typeId = ethernetStack.id)
        part(name = "systemServices", typeId = systemServices.id)
    }
    
    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "vfb", typeId = vfb.id)
    }
    
    val ecu = partDef(name = "Electronic Control Unit") {
        part(name = "hardwareLayer", typeId = hardwareLayer.id)
        part(name = "bswLayer", typeId = bswLayer.id)
        part(name = "applicationLayer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }
    
    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU BDD") {
        include(ecu)
        include(hardwareLayer)
        include(bswLayer)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(communicationController)
        include(canController)
        include(linController)
        include(ethernetController)
        include(bswModule)
        include(mcal)
        include(canStack)
        include(ethernetStack)
        include(systemServices)
        include(cpuCore)
        include(ram)
        include(flashMemory)
        include(vfb)
    }
}
